title: Adhesives & Allied Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Adhesives & Allied Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!
